info.name: StellarRec University Integration API
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for testing StellarRec's University Integration System. This collection covers all endpoints for submitting recommendations to 2000+ universities across North America.

request.description: Authenticate and get JWT token for API access

query.description: Search term for university name or code

request.description: Search and filter from 2000+ North American universities
Get all universities using CommonApp integration
Get universities in California, US
Find Ivy League and top-tier universities
Submit a recommendation to multiple universities (Harvard, Stanford, MIT)
Track the status of all submissions for a recommendation
Retry any failed submissions for a recommendation
Submit recommendations to Canadian universities (Toronto, McGill)
Get comprehensive statistics about university integrations
Get detailed submission statistics with filtering
Get statistics specifically for CommonApp submissions
Check the health status of all university integrations
Get system performance metrics
Get API usage metrics by integration type
Test connection to a specific university's integration
Check rate limit status for CommonApp integration
Reset rate limits for CommonApp integration
Update integration configuration for a university
Validate CommonApp API credentials
Store or update CommonApp API credentials
Get list of credentials that need rotation
Bulk load new universities into the system
Test submission to multiple Ivy League universities
Test submission to UC system universities

exec: // Store auth token if login request
